MELItem.Title: Overhead Flight Crew Rest (OFCR) Duct Heater System

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the overhead flight crew rest (OFCR) duct heater (AMM DDG 21-41-01).

ListItem.Para: Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker HEATER-FLT CREW REST and lock with an INOP tag.
Gain access to flight crew rest duct heater.
Disconnect, cap and stow electrical connector to flight crew rest duct heater.
Temperature control will be degraded and the OFCR may not be usable.
For augmented flight crew operations, flight crew duty periods should be adjusted appropriately.
Cold crew rest temperature can be mitigated by disabling the humidifier. To disable the humidifier, follow the procedures in item MEL 21-71-02.
